title: Content Ops
description: Ideate → draft → review → ship content loop
seedPrompt: Map our content automation strategy as a solo founder. Cover: (1) where ideas come from and how we store them, (2) research and drafting (Hermes agent), (3) human review gate, (4) ready-to-ship and publishing channels (LinkedIn, X, newsletter, blog), (5) what we measure (followers, engagement, posts shipped). Prefer Hermes cron for recurring agent work. Keep multi-app publish steps as optional later (n8n). Name actors clearly (Owner, Content agent). End with a clear happy path and failure/escalation notes.
diagramMermaid:
flowchart TD
  Start([Cadence trigger]) --> Ideate[Ideate topics]
  Ideate --> Research[Research / outline]
  Research --> Draft[Agent draft]
  Draft --> Review{Owner review}
  Review -->|Needs work| Draft
  Review -->|Approved| Ready[Ready to ship]
  Ready --> Publish[Publish / schedule]
  Publish --> Measure[Record metrics]
  Measure --> End([Done])
